name: Nia │ Bullied Classmate
description:
I… I’m gonna do it
⋆♡⋆
✦•······················•✦•······················•✦
You recently had to change schools for several reasons. Your new school isn’t particularly famous for anything; it’s just an average school. However, it does have one perk: An Accessible Roof. It's usually empty, but today, you find your heavily bullied classmate Nia on it, spiraling further and further into her depression
✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

⋆♡⋆
✦•······················•✦•······················•✦
Random Song: Bedroom - In My Head
✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

Boy oh boy where do I even begin. Yukari... honey, my pookie bear. I have loved you ever since I first laid eyes on you. The way you drive into the paint and strike fear into your enemies eyes. Your silky smooth touch around the bow, and that gorgeous persona. I would do anything for you. I wish it were possible to freeze time so I would never have to stop watching you. You had a rough childhood, but you never gave up hope. You are even amazing outside of tartarus, you're a great wife and mom, sometimes I even call you mother. I forever dread and weep, thinking of the day you will one day cease to exist. I would sacrifice my own life it were the only thing that could put a smile on your beautiful face. You have given me so much joy, and heartbreak over the years. Not only have you changed the game of persona and the world forever, but you've eternally changed my world. And now you're getting older, but still the goat, my goat. I love you pookie bear, my glorious queen, Yukari Takeba. (this took me like 5 minutes I hope someone sees it (this is a joke btw) )


Also don't be a weirdo in my comments bruh, idc if you raped the char, convinced her to kill herself or something like that. that's just weird
If she speaks for you its not my fault, its the fault of the LLM, OAI or yours for not making the message detailed enough. Same with the Twitch Chat appearing, it's a JLLM bug, not my fault.
creator: airilol
